description: Alice changes the location of the Wednesday team lunch from the main cafeteria to the rooftop terrace. Time and attendees remain the same.

events.title: Team Lunch
events.reasoning: Alice moves the Wednesday team lunch location from the main cafeteria to the rooftop terrace. Time and duration remain unchanged. Matches calendar event [1].
events.assumptions: Time and duration kept as original. Only location changed.

mock_llm_response.summary: Updated team lunch location to rooftop terrace for Wednesday at noon.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'Wednesday' resolves to 2026-02-25. Only the location field changes in this update. calendar_context[0] so existing_event_id=1.
